title: REF: separate casting out of Index.__new__
body: first of two PRs to separate array casting/inference out of `Index.__new__`.  Once both are in place, we'll be able to do all inference/casting up-front and simplify the constructor quite a bit.  We'll also be able to look into sharing code between Index/Series/array, and address a handful of outstanding issues with the Index constructor.
commits: REF: refactor array casting out of Index.__new__
